# Package Metadata Checklist

- [ ] `name` follows package naming conventions.
- [ ] `version` is intentional.
- [ ] `description` is clear and generic.
- [ ] `license` is present.
- [ ] `repository` points to the correct repository.
- [ ] `files` includes only publishable files.
- [ ] `scripts` include lint, typecheck, test, and build when applicable.
- [ ] Backstage package versions align with the target app.
- [ ] No customer names, secrets, or internal endpoints are present.
